lines.en_lit: as the whole portion is written in this order, except for this verse,
What is the reason Rav Ḥisda said: They learned five immersions and ten sanctifications on that day.
And if you say written in order, you find only three immersions and six sanctifications.
Rabbi Zeira strongly objects to this: But perhaps he interrupts with the goat are performed outside
Abaye said: the verse states: “And he shall exit and make his burnt-offering following first exit he performs his ram and the ram of the people

Rava said The verse states: and he shall remove the linen garments the verse does not state “which he wore,” can remove than what he is wearing? Rather, what the verse states “which he wore”? those which he had already worn
Rabba bar Rav Sheila strongly objects to this: Say he interrupts with the goat are performed outside Isn’t it written: “And he shall exit and make his burnt-offering

Is the entire passage written in order? But the verses it is written: “And he shall burn the fat of the sin-offering upon the altar” and then “And the bull of the sin-offering, and the goat of the sin-offering, Yet we learned One who sees the High Priest reading does not see the bull and goat that are burned, while the portions of the sin-offering are burned afterward.
Say except for this verse and onward.
And what did you see that you rearrange the verses? the mishna.
Abaye said: the verse states: “And the one who sends “And the one who burns just as one who sends earlier, so too, one who burns earlier,
On the contrary, Just as one who burns now, so too, one who sends now,

“And the one who sends” implies that it was earlier. Rava said: the verse states: shall be stood alive How long must it stand alive? until the moment of atonement. And when is the moment of atonement? at the moment of the presenting of the blood, no later.

one who sends comes he finds the High Priest in the market, he says to him: My Master, High Priest, we performed your mission, he finds him in his house, he says to him: The One Who grants life to the living, we performed His mission.
Rabba said: When the Sages take leave from one another in Pumbedita, they say as follows: May the One Who grants life to the living grant you a long, good, and established life.
“I shall walk before the Lord in the lands of the living” Rav Yehuda said: This is the place of markets,

“For length of days, and years of life, and peace, will they add to you” Are there years of life and years that are not of life? Rabbi Elazar said: these years of a person’s life which are transformed for him from bad to good.

“To you men ishim do I call, Rabbi Berekhya said: these Torah scholars, who are similar to women but they act mightily like men And Rabbi Berekhya said one who wishes to pour libations of wine over the altar should fill the throats of Torah scholars with wine, as it is stated: “To you men ishim do I call.”

And Rabbi Berekhya said: If a person sees that Torah is ceasing from his children, he should marry the daughter of a Torah scholar. as it is stated: “Though its root will grow old in the earth, and its trunk will die in the ground,
